arguments.requirementsText:
# Requirements Document

## Introduction

The Vice City Dashboard is a cyberpunk-themed gaming platform that delivers an immersive, cinematic user experience inspired by GTA VI Vice City, Cyberpunk 2077, and futuristic gaming aesthetics. The platform combines glassmorphism, neon UI elements, and vaporwave design with real-time gaming content, social features, and interactive visual effects. Users can browse gaming news, watch trailers and streams, participate in live events, view statistics, engage with the community, and experience dynamic audio-visual effects that respond to user interaction.

## Glossary

- **Dashboard**: The main web application interface
- **User**: Any person accessing the Dashboard
- **Content_Card**: A visual component displaying gaming content (trailers, news, gallery items, characters, media)
- **Live_Widget**: A real-time component showing dynamic data (viewer counts, countdowns, community metrics, social stats)
- **Neon_Glow_Engine**: The visual system responsible for rendering neon lighting effects
- **Particle_System**: The component that generates and animates particle effects
- **Audio_Engine**: The system managing ambient soundtracks and UI sound effects
- **Chat_System**: The real-time messaging component for user communication
- **Authentication_Service**: The system handling user login, registration, and session management
- **Media_Pipeline**: The backend system processing and delivering video content
- **Event**: A scheduled gaming-related occurrence (game launch, tournament, announcement)
- **Watch_Party**: A synchronized group viewing session for video content
- **Hologram_Card**: A 3D visual card component with holographic effects
- **Mouse_Reactive_Glow**: Visual effect that responds to cursor position
- **CRT_Effect**: Visual filter simulating cathode ray tube display distortion
- **VHS_Glitch**: Visual effect simulating VHS tape artifacts
- **Ambient_Soundtrack**: Background music that plays continuously
- **Navigation_Sidebar**: The persistent menu component for site navigation
- **Hero_Section**: The prominent top section of the homepage featuring cinematic content
- **API**: Application Programming Interface for backend communication
- **WebSocket_Connection**: Persistent bidirectional communication channel for real-time features
- **Cache_Layer**: Redis-based temporary data storage for performance optimization
- **Database**: PostgreSQL persistent data storage
- **CDN**: Content Delivery Network for media distribution
- **Viewport**: The visible area of the Dashboard in the browser

## Requirements

### Requirement 1: User Interface Foundation

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see a cyberpunk-themed interface with neon aesthetics, so that I have an immersive gaming experience.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL render with a dark navy background color scheme
2. THE Dashboard SHALL apply glassmorphism effects to UI components
3. THE Neon_Glow_Engine SHALL render neon pink, purple, electric blue, and magenta glow effects
4. WHEN the Dashboard loads, THE Dashboard SHALL display the Navigation_Sidebar with menu items (Home, News, Videos, Events, Stats, Community, Settings)
5. THE Dashboard SHALL use TailwindCSS for styling with custom neon color palette
6. THE Dashboard SHALL maintain visual consistency across all pages
7. FOR ALL interactive elements, the Dashboard SHALL apply neon glow on hover within 100ms

### Requirement 2: Hero Section Display

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see a cinematic hero section when I visit the homepage, so that I am immediately engaged with featured content.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN the homepage loads, THE Hero_Section SHALL display a full-width cinematic background
2. THE Hero_Section SHALL render a neon-styled title with glow effects
3. THE Hero_Section SHALL display at least two call-to-action buttons
4. WHEN the Hero_Section renders, THE Dashboard SHALL animate the title entrance using Framer Motion
5. THE Hero_Section SHALL support video backgrounds with autoplay and loop
6. THE Hero_Section SHALL maintain aspect ratio across viewport sizes from 320px to 3840px width

### Requirement 3: Navigation System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to navigate between different sections of the dashboard, so that I can access various features.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Navigation_Sidebar SHALL display seven navigation items (Home, News, Videos, Events, Stats, Community, Settings)
2. WHEN a User clicks a navigation item, THE Dashboard SHALL navigate to the corresponding page within 200ms
3. THE Navigation_Sidebar SHALL highlight the currently active navigation item with neon glow
4. THE Navigation_Sidebar SHALL remain visible and accessible on all pages
5. WHEN a User hovers over a navigation item, THE Navigation_Sidebar SHALL display a glow effect within 100ms
6. THE Navigation_Sidebar SHALL support keyboard navigation using arrow keys and Enter

### Requirement 4: Live Widgets Display

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see real-time information about the gaming community, so that I stay informed about current activity.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL display Live_Widgets showing live viewer counts, event countdowns, community pulse metrics, and social statistics
2. WHEN live data updates, THE Live_Widget SHALL refresh its display within 2 seconds
3. THE Live_Widget SHALL format numerical data with appropriate separators (e.g., 1,234,567)
4. WHEN a countdown reaches zero, THE Live_Widget SHALL display an "Event Live" indicator
5. THE Live_Widget SHALL animate value changes using smooth transitions
6. IF live data is unavailable, THEN THE Live_Widget SHALL display a "Connecting..." status message

### Requirement 5: Content Card System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to browse gaming content in visually appealing cards, so that I can discover trailers, news, and media.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL render Content_Cards for trailers, news articles, gallery items, characters, and media
2. THE Content_Card SHALL display a thumbnail image, title, and metadata (date, category, duration)
3. WHEN a User hovers over a Content_Card, THE Content_Card SHALL elevate with a 3D transform effect within 100ms
4. THE Content_Card SHALL apply glassmorphism styling with backdrop blur
5. WHEN a User clicks a Content_Card, THE Dashboard SHALL navigate to the detailed content view
6. THE Content_Card SHALL lazy-load images when they enter the Viewport
7. THE Content_Card SHALL display a neon border glow effect

### Requirement 6: Real-Time Chat System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to chat with other users in real-time, so that I can discuss gaming content with the community.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a User is authenticated, THE Chat_System SHALL establish a WebSocket_Connection
2. WHEN a User sends a message, THE Chat_System SHALL broadcast the message to all connected users within 500ms
3. THE Chat_System SHALL display the sender's username and timestamp for each message
4. THE Chat_System SHALL limit message length to 500 characters
5. WHEN a new message arrives, THE Chat_System SHALL auto-scroll to the latest message
6. THE Chat_System SHALL display user online status indicators with neon glow
7. IF the WebSocket_Connection is lost, THEN THE Chat_System SHALL attempt reconnection every 5 seconds for up to 3 attempts

### Requirement 7: User Authentication

**User Story:** As a user, I want to create an account and log in, so that I can access personalized features and participate in the community.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Authentication_Service SHALL support user registration with email and password
2. THE Authentication_Service SHALL support OAuth login with Google, Discord, and Steam providers
3. WHEN a User submits valid credentials, THE Authentication_Service SHALL return a JWT token within 1 second
4. THE Authentication_Service SHALL validate email format before account creation
5. THE Authentication_Service SHALL require passwords with minimum 8 characters, including one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character
6. WHEN authentication fails, THE Authentication_Service SHALL return a descriptive error message
7. THE Authentication_Service SHALL maintain user sessions for 7 days with automatic token refresh

### Requirement 8: Video Streaming

**User Story:** As a user, I want to watch game trailers and streams, so that I can view gaming content.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Media_Pipeline SHALL deliver video content via CDN with adaptive bitrate streaming
2. WHEN a User clicks a video Content_Card, THE Dashboard SHALL load and play the video within 3 seconds
3. THE Dashboard SHALL display video controls (play, pause, volume, fullscreen, quality selection)
4. THE Media_Pipeline SHALL support video formats: MP4, WebM, and HLS streams
5. WHEN network conditions change, THE Media_Pipeline SHALL automatically adjust video quality
6. THE Dashboard SHALL display video loading progress with a neon-styled progress bar
7. THE Dashboard SHALL support picture-in-picture mode for video playback

### Requirement 9: Watch Party Feature

**User Story:** As a user, I want to watch videos synchronously with other users, so that I can share viewing experiences with the community.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a User creates a Watch_Party, THE Dashboard SHALL generate a unique shareable link
2. THE Watch_Party SHALL synchronize video playback state (play, pause, seek) across all participants within 1 second
3. WHEN a participant joins a Watch_Party, THE Watch_Party SHALL sync their video position to the host's current timestamp
4. THE Watch_Party SHALL display participant count and avatars
5. THE Watch_Party SHALL integrate with the Chat_System for participant communication
6. WHEN the host pauses the video, THE Watch_Party SHALL pause for all participants within 500ms
7. THE Watch_Party SHALL support up to 100 concurrent participants

### Requirement 10: Event Management

**User Story:** As a user, I want to view upcoming gaming events and receive notifications, so that I don't miss important announcements or launches.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL display a list of upcoming Events sorted by date
2. THE Dashboard SHALL show Event details including title, description, date, time, and category
3. WHEN a User clicks "Notify Me" on an Event, THE Dashboard SHALL register the User for notifications
4. WHEN an Event starts, THE Dashboard SHALL send a browser notification to registered users
5. THE Dashboard SHALL display a countdown timer for Events starting within 24 hours
6. THE Dashboard SHALL categorize Events by type (game launch, tournament, announcement, update)
7. THE Dashboard SHALL allow filtering Events by category and date range

### Requirement 11: Statistics Dashboard

**User Story:** As a user, I want to view gaming statistics and analytics, so that I can track trends and community metrics.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL display statistics including total users, active viewers, content count, and community engagement metrics
2. THE Dashboard SHALL render statistics using animated charts and graphs with neon styling
3. WHEN statistics data updates, THE Dashboard SHALL animate the transition from old to new values
4. THE Dashboard SHALL support time range selection (24 hours, 7 days, 30 days, all time)
5. THE Dashboard SHALL display statistics with appropriate units and formatting
6. THE Dashboard SHALL render charts using responsive layouts that adapt to Viewport size
7. THE Dashboard SHALL cache statistics data in the Cache_Layer for 5 minutes

### Requirement 12: Mouse Reactive Glow Effect

**User Story:** As a user, I want visual effects to respond to my mouse movement, so that the interface feels interactive and alive.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a User moves the mouse, THE Mouse_Reactive_Glow SHALL render a neon glow effect at the cursor position
2. THE Mouse_Reactive_Glow SHALL follow the cursor with a smooth easing animation
3. THE Mouse_Reactive_Glow SHALL have a radial gradient with neon pink and purple colors
4. THE Mouse_Reactive_Glow SHALL blend with underlying UI elements using additive blending
5. WHERE performance mode is enabled, THE Mouse_Reactive_Glow SHALL reduce effect quality to maintain 60 FPS
6. THE Mouse_Reactive_Glow SHALL be visible on dark backgrounds and subtle on light elements
7. THE Mouse_Reactive_Glow SHALL have a radius of 200-400 pixels with smooth falloff

### Requirement 13: Particle Background System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see animated particle effects in the background, so that the interface has depth and atmosphere.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Particle_System SHALL render animated particles across the background
2. THE Particle_System SHALL generate particles with varying sizes, speeds, and opacity
3. THE Particle_System SHALL animate particles with continuous vertical or diagonal movement
4. THE Particle_System SHALL render between 50 and 200 particles based on device performance
5. WHERE performance mode is enabled, THE Particle_System SHALL reduce particle count by 50%
6. THE Particle_System SHALL use neon colors (pink, purple, blue) with transparency
7. THE Particle_System SHALL maintain 60 FPS performance on devices with GPU acceleration

### Requirement 14: Hologram Card Effects

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see 3D holographic effects on content cards, so that the interface feels futuristic and immersive.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Hologram_Card SHALL render with 3D perspective transformation
2. WHEN a User moves the mouse over a Hologram_Card, THE Hologram_Card SHALL tilt based on cursor position
3. THE Hologram_Card SHALL display a holographic shimmer effect using gradient animations
4. THE Hologram_Card SHALL have a neon border that pulses with 2-second intervals
5. THE Hologram_Card SHALL apply depth shadows to create floating appearance
6. WHEN a User moves the cursor away, THE Hologram_Card SHALL return to neutral position within 300ms
7. THE Hologram_Card SHALL use CSS 3D transforms and WebGL shaders for rendering

### Requirement 15: Audio System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to hear ambient music and UI sound effects, so that the experience is more immersive.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN the Dashboard loads, THE Audio_Engine SHALL play an Ambient_Soundtrack on loop
2. THE Audio_Engine SHALL set initial volume to 30% of maximum
3. WHEN a User clicks UI elements, THE Audio_Engine SHALL play corresponding sound effects within 50ms
4. THE Audio_Engine SHALL provide volume controls accessible from the Settings page
5. THE Audio_Engine SHALL support mute toggle with persistent preference storage
6. THE Audio_Engine SHALL fade audio in over 2 seconds when starting playback
7. WHERE the User has previously muted audio, THE Audio_Engine SHALL remain muted on subsequent visits

### Requirement 16: Visual Effects Suite

**User Story:** As a user, I want to experience retro visual effects like VHS glitch and CRT distortion, so that the aesthetic matches the cyberpunk theme.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHERE VHS effect is enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL apply VHS_Glitch effects randomly every 30-60 seconds
2. THE VHS_Glitch SHALL display scan lines, color distortion, and tracking artifacts for 1-3 seconds
3. WHERE CRT effect is enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL apply CRT_Effect with screen curvature and RGB separation
4. THE CRT_Effect SHALL render scan lines with 2-pixel spacing and 20% opacity
5. THE Dashboard SHALL provide toggle controls for VHS_Glitch and CRT_Effect in Settings
6. THE Dashboard SHALL apply effects using CSS filters and WebGL shaders
7. WHERE performance mode is enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL disable VHS_Glitch and CRT_Effect

### Requirement 17: Smooth Scrolling

**User Story:** As a user, I want smooth, cinematic scrolling behavior, so that navigation feels polished and premium.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL implement smooth scrolling using Lenis library
2. WHEN a User scrolls, THE Dashboard SHALL apply easing with 1.2 second duration
3. THE Dashboard SHALL support both mouse wheel and trackpad scrolling
4. THE Dashboard SHALL implement scroll-triggered animations for Content_Cards entering the Viewport
5. WHEN a Content_Card enters the Viewport, THE Dashboard SHALL fade in and slide up the card within 400ms
6. THE Dashboard SHALL maintain scroll position when navigating back to previous pages
7. THE Dashboard SHALL support keyboard scrolling (Page Up, Page Down, Space, Arrow keys)

### Requirement 18: Parallax Effects

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see depth through parallax scrolling effects, so that the interface has dimensional layers.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL implement parallax scrolling for background layers
2. THE Dashboard SHALL move background elements at 50% of foreground scroll speed
3. THE Dashboard SHALL move mid-ground elements at 75% of foreground scroll speed
4. THE Dashboard SHALL apply parallax effects to the Hero_Section background
5. WHERE performance mode is enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL disable parallax effects
6. THE Dashboard SHALL use GPU-accelerated transforms for parallax animations
7. THE Dashboard SHALL maintain 60 FPS during parallax scrolling

### Requirement 19: Dynamic Lighting System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see dynamic lighting that changes based on content and time, so that the atmosphere is immersive.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL render dynamic lighting effects using WebGL shaders
2. THE Dashboard SHALL adjust ambient lighting color based on featured content theme
3. WHEN displaying action game content, THE Dashboard SHALL use red and orange lighting tones
4. WHEN displaying sci-fi game content, THE Dashboard SHALL use blue and cyan lighting tones
5. THE Dashboard SHALL animate lighting transitions over 3-5 seconds
6. THE Dashboard SHALL apply lighting effects to the Hero_Section and Content_Cards
7. WHERE performance mode is enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL use simplified CSS-based lighting

### Requirement 20: Responsive Design

**User Story:** As a user, I want the dashboard to work on different devices and screen sizes, so that I can access it from desktop, tablet, or mobile.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL support viewport widths from 320px (mobile) to 3840px (4K desktop)
2. WHEN the Viewport width is below 768px, THE Navigation_Sidebar SHALL collapse to a hamburger menu
3. THE Dashboard SHALL use responsive grid layouts that adapt to screen size
4. THE Dashboard SHALL scale font sizes proportionally using clamp() CSS function
5. THE Dashboard SHALL optimize touch targets to minimum 44x44 pixels on mobile devices
6. THE Dashboard SHALL lazy-load images and defer non-critical JavaScript on mobile
7. THE Dashboard SHALL maintain visual hierarchy and readability across all breakpoints

### Requirement 21: Performance Optimization

**User Story:** As a user, I want the dashboard to load quickly and run smoothly, so that I have a responsive experience.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL achieve First Contentful Paint within 1.5 seconds on 4G connection
2. THE Dashboard SHALL achieve Largest Contentful Paint within 2.5 seconds on 4G connection
3. THE Dashboard SHALL maintain 60 FPS during animations and scrolling
4. THE Dashboard SHALL implement code splitting with dynamic imports for route-based chunks
5. THE Dashboard SHALL compress images using WebP format with JPEG fallback
6. THE Dashboard SHALL cache static assets with 1-year expiration headers
7. THE Dashboard SHALL implement service worker for offline content caching

### Requirement 22: API Communication

**User Story:** As a developer, I want the frontend to communicate with the backend API, so that dynamic content can be fetched and displayed.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL communicate with the API using both REST and GraphQL endpoints
2. WHEN fetching data, THE Dashboard SHALL include authentication JWT token in request headers
3. THE Dashboard SHALL implement request retry logic with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s)
4. WHEN an API request fails, THE Dashboard SHALL display a user-friendly error message
5. THE Dashboard SHALL cache API responses in the Cache_Layer based on cache-control headers
6. THE Dashboard SHALL implement request deduplication for identical concurrent requests
7. THE Dashboard SHALL timeout API requests after 10 seconds

### Requirement 23: Real-Time Data Synchronization

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see live updates without refreshing the page, so that I stay current with real-time information.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL establish WebSocket_Connection for real-time data updates
2. WHEN the WebSocket_Connection receives an update, THE Dashboard SHALL update the UI within 500ms
3. THE Dashboard SHALL handle WebSocket events for: new messages, viewer count changes, event notifications, and status updates
4. IF the WebSocket_Connection drops, THEN THE Dashboard SHALL attempt reconnection with exponential backoff
5. THE Dashboard SHALL display connection status indicator (connected, connecting, disconnected)
6. THE Dashboard SHALL queue outgoing messages when connection is temporarily unavailable
7. WHEN connection is restored, THE Dashboard SHALL send queued messages in order

### Requirement 24: News Feed System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to read gaming news articles, so that I stay informed about industry updates.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL display a news feed with articles sorted by publication date
2. THE Dashboard SHALL show article thumbnail, headline, excerpt, author, and publish date
3. WHEN a User clicks an article, THE Dashboard SHALL display the full article content
4. THE Dashboard SHALL support article categories (reviews, announcements, interviews, guides)
5. THE Dashboard SHALL implement infinite scroll loading 10 articles per page
6. THE Dashboard SHALL allow filtering articles by category and date range
7. WHERE AI features are enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL display AI-generated article summaries

### Requirement 25: Community Features

**User Story:** As a user, I want to interact with the gaming community, so that I can share opinions and connect with other gamers.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL display community pulse metrics (active users, trending topics, sentiment score)
2. THE Dashboard SHALL allow users to post comments on articles and videos
3. WHEN a User posts a comment, THE Dashboard SHALL display the comment within 2 seconds
4. THE Dashboard SHALL support comment reactions (like, love, fire, laugh)
5. THE Dashboard SHALL implement comment moderation with profanity filtering
6. THE Dashboard SHALL display user reputation scores based on community engagement
7. WHERE AI features are enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL display AI-generated community sentiment analysis

### Requirement 26: User Settings and Preferences

**User Story:** As a user, I want to customize my dashboard experience, so that it matches my preferences.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL provide a Settings page with customization options
2. THE Dashboard SHALL allow toggling visual effects (VHS_Glitch, CRT_Effect, Particle_System, Mouse_Reactive_Glow)
3. THE Dashboard SHALL allow adjusting audio volume and mute toggle
4. THE Dashboard SHALL provide performance mode toggle that disables resource-intensive effects
5. THE Dashboard SHALL allow selecting color theme variants (neon pink, neon blue, neon purple)
6. THE Dashboard SHALL persist user preferences in browser localStorage
7. WHEN a User changes settings, THE Dashboard SHALL apply changes immediately without page reload

### Requirement 27: Notification System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to receive notifications about events and updates, so that I stay informed.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL request browser notification permission on first visit
2. WHEN a notification-worthy event occurs, THE Dashboard SHALL send a browser notification
3. THE Dashboard SHALL display in-app notification badges on the Navigation_Sidebar
4. THE Dashboard SHALL show a notification center with notification history
5. WHEN a User clicks a notification, THE Dashboard SHALL navigate to the relevant content
6. THE Dashboard SHALL allow users to configure notification preferences by category
7. THE Dashboard SHALL limit notification frequency to prevent spam (maximum 5 per hour)

### Requirement 28: Search Functionality

**User Story:** As a user, I want to search for content, so that I can quickly find specific games, articles, or videos.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL provide a search input accessible from all pages
2. WHEN a User types in the search input, THE Dashboard SHALL display autocomplete suggestions within 300ms
3. THE Dashboard SHALL search across content types (games, articles, videos, events, users)
4. THE Dashboard SHALL display search results grouped by content type
5. THE Dashboard SHALL highlight matching keywords in search results
6. THE Dashboard SHALL implement search result ranking based on relevance and recency
7. THE Dashboard SHALL cache search queries and results for 10 minutes

### Requirement 29: Accessibility Compliance

**User Story:** As a user with disabilities, I want the dashboard to be accessible, so that I can use all features regardless of my abilities.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL provide keyboard navigation for all interactive elements
2. THE Dashboard SHALL maintain focus indicators with 3px neon outline on focused elements
3. THE Dashboard SHALL provide ARIA labels for all icon buttons and interactive components
4. THE Dashboard SHALL maintain color contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for text content
5. THE Dashboard SHALL support screen reader announcements for dynamic content updates
6. THE Dashboard SHALL provide skip navigation links to main content areas
7. THE Dashboard SHALL allow disabling animations via prefers-reduced-motion media query

### Requirement 30: Error Handling and Recovery

**User Story:** As a user, I want clear error messages and recovery options when something goes wrong, so that I can continue using the dashboard.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN an error occurs, THE Dashboard SHALL display a user-friendly error message with neon styling
2. THE Dashboard SHALL log errors to the backend for monitoring and debugging
3. THE Dashboard SHALL provide actionable recovery options (retry, refresh, go home)
4. WHEN a page fails to load, THE Dashboard SHALL display an error boundary with recovery UI
5. THE Dashboard SHALL implement graceful degradation for unsupported browsers
6. WHEN media fails to load, THE Dashboard SHALL display a placeholder with retry option
7. THE Dashboard SHALL display network status indicator when offline

### Requirement 31: Data Persistence and Caching

**User Story:** As a user, I want my data and preferences to persist across sessions, so that I don't lose my settings and progress.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL store user preferences in browser localStorage
2. THE Dashboard SHALL cache API responses in the Cache_Layer with appropriate TTL values
3. THE Dashboard SHALL implement service worker caching for offline functionality
4. THE Dashboard SHALL sync user data to the Database for cross-device persistence
5. WHEN cache data expires, THE Dashboard SHALL fetch fresh data from the API
6. THE Dashboard SHALL implement cache invalidation when user performs write operations
7. THE Dashboard SHALL limit localStorage usage to 5MB per domain

### Requirement 32: Analytics and Tracking

**User Story:** As a product owner, I want to track user behavior and engagement, so that I can improve the dashboard based on data.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL track page views, user interactions, and feature usage
2. THE Dashboard SHALL send analytics events to the backend without blocking UI operations
3. THE Dashboard SHALL track performance metrics (load time, FPS, error rate)
4. THE Dashboard SHALL implement privacy-compliant tracking with user consent
5. THE Dashboard SHALL batch analytics events and send every 30 seconds or 50 events
6. THE Dashboard SHALL track conversion events (sign-ups, video views, event registrations)
7. THE Dashboard SHALL anonymize user data in analytics reports

### Requirement 33: Content Management

**User Story:** As a content administrator, I want to manage dashboard content, so that I can keep information current and relevant.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHERE the User has admin role, THE Dashboard SHALL display content management controls
2. THE Dashboard SHALL allow creating, editing, and deleting articles, videos, and events
3. WHEN an admin publishes content, THE Dashboard SHALL update the live site within 30 seconds
4. THE Dashboard SHALL support content scheduling for future publication
5. THE Dashboard SHALL provide content preview before publishing
6. THE Dashboard SHALL maintain content revision history with rollback capability
7. THE Dashboard SHALL support bulk content operations (publish, unpublish, delete)

### Requirement 34: Security Implementation

**User Story:** As a user, I want my data to be secure, so that my personal information is protected.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL communicate with the API exclusively over HTTPS
2. THE Dashboard SHALL implement Content Security Policy headers to prevent XSS attacks
3. THE Dashboard SHALL sanitize user-generated content before rendering
4. THE Dashboard SHALL implement CSRF protection for state-changing operations
5. THE Dashboard SHALL store JWT tokens in httpOnly cookies, not localStorage
6. THE Dashboard SHALL implement rate limiting on authentication endpoints (5 attempts per 15 minutes)
7. THE Dashboard SHALL automatically log out users after 30 minutes of inactivity

### Requirement 35: Weather Ambiance System

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see ambient weather effects that match the cyberpunk theme, so that the atmosphere is more immersive.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHERE weather effects are enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL render animated rain particles
2. THE Dashboard SHALL render rain particles with neon glow trails
3. THE Dashboard SHALL animate rain particles falling vertically at 500-800 pixels per second
4. THE Dashboard SHALL generate 100-300 rain particles based on device performance
5. THE Dashboard SHALL apply rain particle reflections on UI elements using blend modes
6. WHERE performance mode is enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL reduce rain particle count by 70%
7. THE Dashboard SHALL allow toggling weather effects in Settings

### Requirement 36: AI-Powered Features

**User Story:** As a user, I want AI-enhanced features that provide intelligent insights, so that I get more value from the platform.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHERE AI features are enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL display AI-generated news summaries
2. WHERE AI features are enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL display AI-analyzed community sentiment scores
3. WHERE AI features are enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL provide an AI chatbot for user assistance
4. WHERE AI features are enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL display AI-generated trailer analysis and highlights
5. WHEN a User asks the AI chatbot a question, THE Dashboard SHALL respond within 3 seconds
6. THE Dashboard SHALL clearly label AI-generated content as such
7. THE Dashboard SHALL allow users to opt out of AI features in Settings

### Requirement 37: Three.js 3D Integration

**User Story:** As a user, I want to see 3D graphics and effects, so that the interface has depth and visual interest.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL render 3D scenes using Three.js and React Three Fiber
2. THE Dashboard SHALL display 3D character models on character detail pages
3. THE Dashboard SHALL implement 3D camera controls (orbit, zoom, pan) for 3D scenes
4. THE Dashboard SHALL render 3D scenes at 60 FPS on devices with GPU acceleration
5. THE Dashboard SHALL apply post-processing effects (bloom, chromatic aberration) to 3D scenes
6. WHERE performance mode is enabled, THE Dashboard SHALL reduce 3D scene quality and disable post-processing
7. THE Dashboard SHALL lazy-load 3D models when they enter the Viewport

### Requirement 38: Gallery and Media Browser

**User Story:** As a user, I want to browse game screenshots and artwork, so that I can explore visual content.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL display a gallery grid with game screenshots and artwork
2. WHEN a User clicks a gallery item, THE Dashboard SHALL open a fullscreen lightbox view
3. THE Dashboard SHALL support keyboard navigation in lightbox (arrow keys, escape)
4. THE Dashboard SHALL display image metadata (title, game, resolution, upload date)
5. THE Dashboard SHALL implement image lazy loading with blur-up placeholder
6. THE Dashboard SHALL support image filtering by game, category, and date
7. THE Dashboard SHALL allow users to download images in original resolution

### Requirement 39: Character Database

**User Story:** As a user, I want to explore game characters with detailed profiles, so that I can learn about characters in featured games.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. THE Dashboard SHALL display a character database with character cards
2. THE Dashboard SHALL show character name, game, role, and thumbnail on character cards
3. WHEN a User clicks a character card, THE Dashboard SHALL display detailed character profile
4. THE Dashboard SHALL display character attributes (class, abilities, backstory, stats)
5. WHERE 3D models are available, THE Dashboard SHALL render interactive 3D character models
6. THE Dashboard SHALL support character filtering by game and role
7. THE Dashboard SHALL display character popularity ranking based on community engagement

### Requirement 40: Configuration File Parser

**User Story:** As a developer, I want to parse dashboard configuration files, so that settings can be loaded from external sources.

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. WHEN a valid configuration file is provided, THE Configuration_Parser SHALL parse it into a Configuration object
2. WHEN an invalid configuration file is provided, THE Configuration_Parser SHALL return a descriptive error message with line number and issue description
3. THE Configuration_Pretty_Printer SHALL format Configuration objects back into valid configuration files
4. FOR ALL valid Configuration objects, parsing then printing then parsing SHALL produce an equivalent Configuration object (round-trip property)
5. THE Configuration_Parser SHALL validate required fields (apiEndpoint, wsEndpoint, cdnUrl, features)
6. THE Configuration_Parser SHALL support JSON and YAML configuration formats
7. THE Configuration_Parser SHALL apply default values for optional configuration fields

## Notes

This requirements document defines the functional and non-functional requirements for the Vice City Dashboard cyberpunk gaming platform. The requirements follow EARS patterns and INCOSE quality rules to ensure clarity, testability, and completeness. Implementation should prioritize performance, accessibility, and user experience while maintaining the distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic throughout all features.

The platform combines modern web technologies with immersive visual effects to create a unique gaming content experience. Special attention should be paid to performance optimization, as the rich visual effects and real-time features require careful resource management to maintain smooth 60 FPS performance across devices.
